subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #033 The Return of the Prophets
subcodes.first_line: Baha'u'llah has set forth a lengthy and detailed explanation of this matter in the Book of Certitude.
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک در ایقان بیان اینمطلب را مفصل و مشروح مرقوم فرموده‌اند
subcodes.subjects: @return of the Manifestations of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @John the Baptist, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible
